title: Runtime Ledger Control Room
concept: A light technical control-room interface that makes runtime settings, reset/reload consequences, command search, saved-object mutation, import replacement, and portability events visible beside a protected live WordPress shell.
flows: Discover a runtime command through search, select the grouped result, complete the settings form, confirm reset or saved reload, show progress, and mutate runtime badges, preview state, path, and event history
Import a ZIP end to end with source selection, replacement warning, validation progress, failure state, success state, and active Playground identity update
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress copy, storage badges, reload consequences, and saved ledger mutation
Rename and delete a Playground with confirmation, shell title mutation, saved row mutation, event history, and fallback to an Unsaved Playground after deletion
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin from the same selected runtime object
Launch Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import routes while preserving the active shell controls
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR number or URL route
Gutenberg PR or branch route
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native-source model, replacement warning, validation failure, progress, and success
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequence
Save progress with file counts
Saved, local, imported, and unsaved Playground ledger
Open, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, delete progress, row mutation, and active fallback
Path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, reset, and reload consequences
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite controls
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset versus saved/local Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty/save/result affordances
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, driver, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
GitHub import and export
ZIP import and ZIP download
Database download and Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer and mutation event stream
